long_notes:
Hey guys! If you are a big fan of Grok, then you probably know about Grok 4.20 launching in public beta on the Grok app on February 17th, and how it’s been in an early-access beta on the API. 

Well, I have some exciting news: I was granted early access to Grok 4.20 on the API two days ago! And because I was able to test Grok 4.20 and see how the models work, I was able to integrate them into Grok AI Chat! There is just one catch, which is that you still have to be personally approved by xAI to even have access to Grok 4.20.

But this shortcut also helps with that. Go to the ⚙️ Settings menu and tap on the new menu option “Grok 4.20 Early Access”, and there is an option that will take you to xAI’s official request form that you can fill out in your browser. And after you receive approval by email, go back to that menu option and confirm your access to Grok 4.20, and then all of the new models will be added as usable in your chats!

Users of Grok 4.20 are highly encouraged to submit feedback to help xAI further improve the models. So after you have access to the Grok 4.20 models within Grok AI Chat, then going back to the “Grok 4.20 Early Access” option will show another option to open xAI’s official Grok 4.20 Feedback form so you can share your own experiences with the models.

You can also use any of the Grok 4.20 models in Grok AI Nano once you have access! I hope you guys enjoy this update!
